title: fagara stuhlmannii
intro: Fagara stuhlmannii, also known as the Zanthoxylum chalybeum, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, commonly referred to as the prickly ash tree or fagara tree. This tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Fagara stuhlmannii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Fagara stuhlmannii include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
